def positive_filter_and_map_results_materialized_to_list_at_each_step():
    rule_id = "filter_and_map_results_materialized_to_list_at_each_step"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "list(filter(...)) followed by list(map(...)), materializing intermediate collections; use a generator pipeline."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
